EASTERN NORTH ATLANTIC.
GUINEA-BISSAU.
SENEGAL.
THE GAMBIA.
DNC 01.
20 METER CANOE BASSIROU FALL, BLUE AND WHITE HULL,
THREE PERSONS ON BOARD, OVERDUE.
LAST KNOWN POSITION 12-47.00N 016-57.00W ON 27 DEC 22.
VESSELS IN VICINITY REQUESTED TO KEEP
A SHARP LOOKOUT, ASSIST IF POSSIBLE. REPORTS TO RCC DAKAR,
